# Phase 2: Data Restructuring & Types - Context

**Gathered:** 2026-04-13

<domain>
## Phase Boundary

Component files contain rendering logic only, with data and types extracted into dedicated modules. Blog data lives in individual post files, large hardcoded arrays are imported from data files, and all structures have TypeScript types with Zod runtime validation.

</domain>

All implementation choices are at Claude's discretion — pure infrastructure/restructuring phase. Use ROADMAP phase goal, success criteria, and codebase conventions to guide decisions.
